revision.content:
[[File:ArduinoDay2017_banners_02.jpg]]

Join us April 1, 2017 from 12pm to 4pm for our Arduino Day Celebration. More details will be revealed as the date approaches, but we can guarantee:

* Arduino stuff and components and sensors to play with
* Member and Community Project 'Show and Tell'
* Snacks!

Come check out Bloomington's Hackerspace at 1609 S Rogers, Bldg 4. Lots of FREE PARKING, too!
